creator: peterj@FreeBSD.org
text:
I also have a RockPRO64 (RK3399) and the PCIe slot works as expected with a different SATA card.  I haven't checked the same card but wouldn't expect any difference.

I've posted a complete verbose boot at https://home.rulingia.com/~peter/private/VerboseBoot.txt

That includes some timer checks around the reset to check that the DELAY works.
